title: Sonic Cycle
description: Zip around on a Tron-inspired motorcycle powered by the Warden's sonic shrieks
body:
## Support Me

[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png)](https://youtube.com/@L33tfox) [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/WjmZaDTFpn) [![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png)](https://x.com/L33tfx)

## Information

this mod adds the Sonic Cycle - a new form of transportation inspired by Light Cycles from the Tron series. however, instead of being powered by light, they are powered by the warden's sonic shrieks.

this is a fabric mod for 1.21 and 1.21.1. to use the mod on forge or neoforge, make sure you also have [Sinytra Connector](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector) and [Forgified Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgified-fabric-api) installed.

## Crafting & Usage

to craft a Sonic Cycle, you will need 3 echo shards, 1 minecart, and 2 iron:

![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a47660fc26fdcd87e0c9584a2d0cebc903e3503.png)

place down the Sonic Cycle and begin riding! anything that walks into the sonic shriek trail left behind by the Sonic Cycle while you are riding will be damaged.

you can also hold down the jump key while riding for a speed boost, but this will make it more difficult to turn quickly.

use shaders for the best experience.

## Config

there is a config included with the mod to change how much your screen and the Sonic Cycle model tilt when turning. Mod Menu and Cloth Config API are optional dependencies for easily accessing the config.

## Public Usage

if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video.

*   **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports
*   **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this mod or assets from this mod.
*   **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
